name: Matrix Man
description: MATRIX MAN: OVERRIDE Escape the System, Become the Glitch! The world is a lie, a digital prison controlled by weak NPCs &zwj;. You are built different&mdash;Matrix Man&mdash;a high-value shooter with insane reflexes, bullet-time dodges &zwj;, and next-level hacking skills. RUN the system or RULE it. Headshots only&mdash;no weak moves. Unlock forbidden cyber-weapons. Break free, take over, and OWN the game. Most will stay plugged in. Only legends will OVERRIDE. Are you ready?
instructions: Move Arrow keys WASD Aim Mouse Jump Space J Fire Left Mouse Button Z Throw Disruptor Right Mouse Button X Slow-Mo Focus Left Shift C Cycle Weapons Mouse Wheel Q E Enter Vehicle E Enter Pause Esc P Mute Audio M Change View V
